docs.title: GREA
docs.text: Welcome to the official documentation of GREA!

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: Want to start using it immediately? Check out the Installation Guide and Usage Guide.

docs.title: Installation Guide
docs.text: This guide explains how to install and configure GREA.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
Before installation, please ensure you have the following dependencies:

  • Python >= 3.12
  • Other dependencies (if applicable)

docs.title: Install via pip
docs.text:
You can install it directly using pip:

pip install grea

docs.title: Usage Guide
docs.text: This guide explains how to use GREA.
